summary.en: USD liquidity is in short-term tightening mode, medium-term neutral. TGA surged $227B in a single week — the largest weekly drain of 2026 — pushing net liquidity down $215B. Bank reserves have fallen below $3T, approaching the 2019 Fed emergency intervention threshold.
summary.zh: 美元流动性处于短期紧缩、中期中性状态。TGA 单周暴增 2270 亿美元——2026 年最大单周抽水——推动净流动性下降 2150 亿美元。银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元，接近 2019 年美联储紧急干预水平。

rrp_note.en: Near zero — liquidity buffer fully depleted
rrp_note.zh: 接近零——流动性缓冲已完全耗尽

tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——2026 年最高，税日暴增

net_liquidity_change.zh: -2150 亿美元（周环比）——2026 年最大单周抽水

details.en: TGA hit $924.4B — the highest level of 2026 — driven by tax-day inflows. This single-week $227B surge directly drained bank reserves below $3T ($2.98T), approaching the critical threshold where the Fed was forced to intervene in September 2019. With RRP at effectively zero, there is no buffer left. The medium-term outlook improves as TGA is expected to peak and unwind in mid-May, releasing liquidity back into the system.
details.zh: TGA 达到 9244 亿美元——2026 年最高水平——由税日资金流入驱动。单周 2270 亿美元的暴增直接将银行准备金压低至 3 万亿美元以下（2.98 万亿美元），接近 2019 年 9 月美联储被迫紧急干预的关键门槛。RRP 已实际归零，没有任何缓冲空间。中期展望有所改善，预计 TGA 将于 5 月中旬见顶回落，届时流动性将重新释放回系统。

reason.en: TGA surged $227B in one week — the largest single-week drain of 2026. Net liquidity fell $215B WoW to $5.782T. Bank reserves dropped below $3T ($2.98T), approaching the September 2019 Fed emergency intervention level. RRP is near zero with no buffer remaining. Short-term tightening is severe; medium-term neutral as TGA expected to unwind in mid-May.
reason.zh: TGA 单周暴增 2270 亿美元——2026 年最大单周抽水。净流动性周环比下降 2150 亿美元至 5.782 万亿美元。银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元（2.98 万亿美元），接近 2019 年 9 月美联储紧急干预水平。RRP 接近零，没有缓冲空间。短期紧缩严峻；中期中性，预计 TGA 将于 5 月中旬回落。

reason.en: 88% of reporting companies beat EPS estimates by an average of +10.8% — a strong beat rate. However, Forward P/E has expanded to 20.9x, pricing in significant future growth. The earnings quality is good on the surface, but 'beat and drop' price reactions suggest the market has already priced in the good news.
reason.zh: 88% 的报告公司超出 EPS 预期，平均超预期幅度 +10.8%——超预期率强劲。但前瞻市盈率已扩张至 20.9 倍，预支了大量未来增长。表面上盈利质量良好，但「超预期后下跌」的价格反应表明市场已将好消息充分定价。

reason.en: NYSE A/D Line made a new high, confirming the index breakout — a positive breadth signal. However, only approximately 49-55% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA, still below the 60% threshold for broad participation. Breadth is improving but not yet confirming a broad bull market.
reason.zh: NYSE 涨跌线（A/D Line）创新高，确认指数突破——这是正面的广度信号。但标普 500 中仅约 49-55% 的股票位于 200 日均线上方，仍低于广泛参与所需的 60% 门槛。广度正在改善，但尚未确认全面牛市。

reason.en: 'Beat and drop' pattern is spreading: Abbott beat estimates but fell 4%, Schwab beat but fell 5.2%, Goldman Sachs beat but also fell. When multiple market leaders sell off on good news, it signals that good news is fully priced in and the market is beginning to look ahead at potential deterioration. Next week 93 companies report — monitor closely.
reason.zh: 「超预期后下跌」模式正在扩散：Abbott 超预期但跌 4%，Schwab 超预期但跌 5.2%，高盛超预期也下跌。当多家市场龙头在好消息上遭到抛售，意味着好消息已被充分定价，市场开始前瞻潜在的恶化。下周 93 家公司报告——需密切关注。

trading_summary.en:
51.5 — liquidity tightening. TGA surged $227B in one week, net liquidity drained $215B — largest weekly drain of 2026. Earnings strong but priced in, 'beat and drop' spreading. Nasdaq up 13 straight days — don't chase.

Hold 35-40% cash. Wait for TGA to peak and unwind (mid-May), wait for net liquidity to stabilize, wait for breadth above 60%. S&P at 6,700-6,800 is where you add, not at 7,126.
trading_summary.zh:
51.5分。流动性在收紧，TGA 税季暴增 $227B，净流动性一周蒸发 $215B——2026 年最大单周抽水。盈利好但已被定价，「beat and drop」在扩散。Nasdaq 连涨 13 天不要追。

持有 35-40% 现金。等 TGA 见顶回落（预计 5 月中旬），等净流动性企稳，等广度扩展到 60%+。S&P 回调至 6,700-6,800 是加仓位置，7,126 不是。

trading_quote: The trend is your friend until the end when it bends.

note.en: Strong rally, but stretched at these levels
note.zh: 强劲反弹，但当前点位已偏高

note.en: 13 consecutive up days — longest streak since 2009
note.zh: 连涨 13 天——2009 年以来最长连涨
收益率曲线 +55 bps，持续陡化
美元在多周低位附近企稳

note.en: Near all-time highs, safe-haven demand intact
note.zh: 接近历史高位，避险需求持续

note.en: Sharp drop — demand concerns, geopolitical premium unwinding
note.zh: 大幅下跌——需求担忧，地缘政治溢价消退
突破 $75K 阻力位，动能积累
持续下降，自满情绪风险上升

analysis.en: BTC broke above the key $75,000 resistance level with a +3% move, reaching $77,224. This is a technically significant breakout. The 52-week range of $60,074–$126,198 shows substantial upside potential. Fear & Greed at 60 (Greed) indicates positive sentiment without being overheated. Exchange net outflows continue, suggesting accumulation. Key next resistance: $80,000 psychological level.
analysis.zh: BTC 以 +3% 的涨幅突破关键 $75,000 阻力位，达到 $77,224。这是技术上的重要突破。52 周区间 $60,074–$126,198 显示出可观的上行空间。恐惧贪婪指数 60（贪婪）表明情绪积极但未过热。交易所净流出持续，暗示积累行为。下一个关键阻力位：$80,000 心理关口。

key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 美元走弱

key_driver_detail.en: Central bank buying + geopolitical risk + weak DXY
key_driver_detail.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 美元偏弱

analysis.en: Gold advances toward all-time highs, up +0.85% to $4,849.40. The combination of dollar weakness (DXY 98.23), persistent central bank buying, and geopolitical risk premium continues to drive the bull case. The gold/silver ratio at 88.5 remains historically stretched. WTI crude's sharp -7.86% drop may reduce inflation concerns, which could be a mild headwind for gold, but safe-haven demand is dominating.
analysis.zh: 黄金向历史高位推进，上涨 +0.85% 至 $4,849.40。美元走弱（DXY 98.23）、央行持续购金和地缘政治风险溢价三重因素继续驱动看涨逻辑。金银比 88.5 仍处历史高位。WTI 原油大跌 -7.86% 可能减轻通胀担忧，对黄金构成轻微逆风，但避险需求仍占主导。

title.zh: 银行准备金接近 2019 年危机水平

description.en: TGA at $924B is the highest of 2026. Bank reserves have fallen to $2.98T — approaching the ~$2.9T level that triggered the Fed's emergency repo intervention in September 2019. With RRP near zero providing no buffer, any further TGA increase or unexpected liquidity demand could stress short-term funding markets. Net liquidity drained $215B in a single week.
description.zh: TGA 达到 9244 亿美元，为 2026 年最高。银行准备金降至 2.98 万亿美元——接近 2019 年 9 月触发美联储紧急回购干预的约 2.9 万亿美元水平。RRP 接近零毫无缓冲，任何 TGA 进一步增加或意外流动性需求都可能给短期融资市场带来压力。净流动性单周蒸发 2150 亿美元。

title.en: Beat-and-Drop Spreading — 93 Companies Report Next Week
title.zh: 「超预期后下跌」扩散——下周 93 家公司报告

description.en: Abbott fell 4% after beating estimates. Schwab fell 5.2% after beating. Goldman Sachs beat and also fell. When multiple market leaders sell off on good news, the market is signaling that positive earnings are fully priced in. With 93 companies reporting next week, the risk of broad 'beat and drop' reactions could weigh on indices even as earnings remain strong.
description.zh: Abbott 超预期后跌 4%。Schwab 超预期后跌 5.2%。高盛超预期也下跌。当多家市场龙头在好消息上遭到抛售，市场在发出信号：正面盈利已被充分定价。下周 93 家公司报告，即使盈利保持强劲，广泛的「超预期后下跌」反应也可能拖累指数。

title.zh: Nasdaq 连涨 13 天——统计极端值

description.en: Nasdaq's 13 consecutive up days is the longest streak since 2009. Statistical extremes like this historically mean-revert. Forward P/E at 20.9x has already priced in significant earnings growth. The combination of stretched valuations, a statistical extreme in momentum, and 'beat and drop' price action creates a setup where the risk/reward of chasing is poor.
description.zh: Nasdaq 连涨 13 天是 2009 年以来最长连涨纪录。历史上此类统计极端值往往会均值回归。前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍已预支大量盈利增长。估值偏高、动能统计极端值和「超预期后下跌」价格行为三者叠加，追涨的风险回报比极差。

status.zh: 活跃——「超预期后下跌」扩散

description.en: The 'beat and drop' pattern is no longer isolated — it is spreading across multiple sectors. Abbott (healthcare) beat EPS estimates and fell 4%. Charles Schwab (financials) beat and fell 5.2%. Goldman Sachs (financials) beat and also fell. This multi-sector divergence pattern is a 6-month early warning signal. When the market consistently sells good news, it is pricing in future deterioration. Monitor next week's 93 reporting companies closely for continuation or reversal of this pattern.
description.zh: 「超预期后下跌」模式已不再孤立——它正在跨多个板块扩散。Abbott（医疗）超预期后跌 4%。嘉信理财（金融）超预期后跌 5.2%。高盛（金融）超预期也下跌。这种跨板块背离模式是 6 个月的早期预警信号。当市场持续在好消息上抛售，意味着它正在提前定价未来的恶化。密切关注下周 93 家报告公司，观察这一模式是否延续或逆转。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, BTC, Gold

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
